backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the e-commerce backend with CRUD operations for products, orders, custom order requests, return requests, wishlist, and categories, all protected by an admin passcode.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old ReturnRequest schema (id, orderId, description fields) into the new schema (orderNumber, customerName, message, video fields) while preserving all other actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features—required returns form fields, mandatory video upload on returns page, and admin panel return request viewer—to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component and page.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file setting up Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, loading the Nunito 700 font from Google Fonts and mounting the app into the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the layout in CartProvider, and shows a 2.2-second loading screen on initial mount.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminCusto: Admin component that fetches and displays custom order requests in a grid, showing details like product type, size, color, budget, and inspiration image. Handles loading and error states with skeletons and messages.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminOrder: Admin component for viewing and managing regular orders, displaying customer info, totals, and a status dropdown to update each order's fulfillment status. Shows loading skeletons and handles status update mutations with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminProdu: Admin CRUD interface for products, providing dialogs to add or edit products (title, description, price, category, bestseller flag, image upload) and delete confirmation. Uses mutation hooks and supports image upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminRetur: Admin component that lists return requests with customer details, reason badges, optional message, and a condition video player with download support. Handles loading and error states with skeleton placeholders.
Slide-in cart drawer showing cart items, total price, and buttons to proceed to checkout or view the full cart page. Locks body scroll when open and closes on backdrop click.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItem.ts: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, price, quantity selector, total price, and a remove button using cart context actions.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderSu: Displays a checkout order summary panel listing cart items with quantities, subtotal, shipping cost (with free shipping logic), and grand total.
frontend/src/components/home/AboutSectio: A full-width 'Our Story' section with a parallax background image, dark overlay, and fade-in text animation triggered by an intersection observer.
frontend/src/components/home/BestSellers: Fetches and displays a grid of best-seller product cards with loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a 'View All Products' navigation button.
frontend/src/components/home/CTABanner.t: A call-to-action banner section with a headline, subtitle, and a link to the products page, animated into view via intersection observer.
frontend/src/components/home/FloatingYar: Renders a canvas-based animation of softly drifting radial gradient orbs to create a subtle floating yarn visual effect in the hero section.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: Full-screen hero section with a parallax background, floating yarn canvas animation, fade-in brand text, a 'Shop Now' CTA link, and a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand description, social media links (Instagram, Pinterest, email), and a multi-column navigation grid including legal and policy links.
frontend/src/components/layout/MusicTogg: A play/pause button that lazily loads background audio and fades volume in/out smoothly when toggled.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Responsive fixed navbar with scroll-aware styling, desktop/mobile navigation links, and a cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Email newsletter signup form with basic validation that shows a toast notification on successful or failed submission.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading overlay displaying an animated yarn ball SVG, the brand name, and a bouncing dots indicator while the app initializes.
frontend/src/components/product-detail/Q: Increment/decrement quantity selector component with configurable min/max bounds and disabled states.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product card with image, title, category, price, and buttons for quick-add to cart and view product detail. Uses CartContext for cart operations and shows a toast notification on add.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (items, totals, item count) with localStorage persistence and add/update/remove/clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Hook that uses IntersectionObserver to return a boolean indicating whether a referenced element has entered the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductFilters.ts: Hook that memoizes filtering and sorting of a product list based on category, price range, bestseller flag, and sort order.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products, orders, custom order requests, and return requests against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, DM Sans), sets up Tailwind, defines a soft luxury beige/cream CSS variable palette for light and dark modes, and declares keyframe animations (fadeUp, float, spin-slow, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Password-protected admin dashboard page that gates access with a hardcoded passcode and renders tabbed management panels for products, orders, custom orders, and return requests.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items and an order summary with totals, and provides navigation to checkout or back to the products listing.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with a shipping information form that collects customer details, calculates shipping, constructs an Order object, and submits it via the useCreateOrder mutation before redirecting to a thank-you page.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrderPage.tsx: Custom order request page with a form for product type, size, color, budget, description, and optional inspiration image upload, which submits a CustomOrderRequest to the backend via the useCreateCustomOrder mutation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that composes the HeroSection, BestSellersSection, AboutSection, and CTABanner components into a single landing page layout.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single product's details (image, price, description, badges) fetched by ID, with quantity controls and add-to-cart/buy-now actions that navigate to checkout.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Lists all products in a filterable, searchable grid with dynamic category extraction, price range filters, and sort controls derived from fetched product data.
frontend/src/pages/ReturnsPage.tsx: Provides a return request form with order number, reason selection, and optional unboxing video upload (with validation and progress tracking), alongside policy information cards.
frontend/src/pages/ThankYouPage.tsx: Order confirmation page shown after checkout, displaying the order ID, a secure payment-via-email notice, and next-steps information with links back to home and products.
frontend/src/utils/currency.ts: Exports a single `formatINR` helper that formats a number as Indian Rupees using the Intl API with Indian comma notation and no decimal places.
frontend/src/utils/shipping.ts: Exports a `calculateShipping` function that returns ₹80 shipping for orders below ₹2999 and free shipping otherwise, along with the threshold and cost constants.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (cream, warm), fonts (Playfair Display, DM Sans), shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state including existing features, architectural notes, and new feature requests for an e-commerce app with checkout shipping logic, a Returns Page with mandatory video upload, and a PIN-protected Admin Panel storing videos on-chain.
